LCC-HS10-L2-10001300-HSWH-ARA-NAV-01 • HS Social Studies: World History • Enlightenment Philosophers and the Americas

The Bottom Row

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students discussing?
2QUESTION 2: Why did the boy stack the cards the way he did?
3QUESTION 3: What does the boy mean when he says "without the bottom row, the top row doesn't really happen"?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
